name: jwt-setup
title: JWT Authentication Setup (ASP.NET Core)
description: Configures JWT bearer authentication with token validation parameters.
bestPractices: Always validate issuer and audience to prevent token misuse
Store the signing key in environment variables or a secrets manager — never in source code
Use short-lived access tokens combined with refresh token rotation
pitfalls: Omitting audience or issuer validation opens the server to token substitution attacks
Using a weak or short signing key reduces security below acceptable thresholds
securityNotes: The signing key must be at least 256 bits (32 bytes) for HS256
Use HTTPS exclusively to prevent bearer tokens from being intercepted in transit
